title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 531.040 - When defendant shall appear — prosecutor to proceed, how
text:
531.040.  When defendant shall appear — prosecutor to proceed, how. — Such person, against whom an information in the nature of a quo warranto shall be prosecuted, shall appear and answer at the same term in which the same information shall be filed, unless the court shall give further time; and such person prosecuting such information shall proceed thereupon with the most convenient speed.
(RSMo 1939 § 1785) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 1621; 1919 § 2069; 1909 § 2634
